title: Cybercraft Season 2
description: This modpack adds plenty of mods, set in the steam era, it is made for the cybercraft server
body: ![Pack Overview](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ZyRBaxW0/images/2abc1b9245e5deb5d5736f8b9f309ed11b00b7b5.png) **overview of the modpack ^** Ever wanted to do more in Minecraft? This mod pack fixes just that. Experience Minecraft in a new way in the Steam era with new ways to explore and fight with tons of mods to improve your experience and add TONS more gameplay, With mythical beasts, rare metals, extreme machines, and of course THE CREATE MOD!, **We can almost guarantee that you will have fun!** **join today!** (click the discord to join!) **This Modpack is 100% plug and play, go to the "Multiplayer" Tab and enter in the IP address: Cybercraft.ddns.net.25565** Made by MGamez977YT made for the cybercraft java server. this mod pack contains multiple necessary mods for the cybercraft java minecraft server, if there are any mods you would like added let me know. **This Modpack Contains 100+ Mods (and 200+ on the dedicated Minecraft server)** † †*There are 100+ mods on the mod-pack and 200+ on the server, the server is entirely separate from the mod-pack and does not have to be accounted for, this claim is only so people understand what is on the server* ![Mountaina castle](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/ZyRBaxW0/images/f223e46e5e24800ddfb1d9c1310f41bf4a45d4ae.png) **Mountaina Castle ^** **Don't ask for forge, fabric will be the only loader** **What is fabric** Fabric is a lightweight, experimental modding toolchain for Minecraft. **what do these mods do?** These mods are client-side and are made for use with the server mods If these mods aren't running with the server the game will not run. for use in only the curse forge mod loader (runs on fabric) **how do I suggest a mod?** use the discord server to suggest a mod please place a link and why it should be added
